### Сравнение CSSA ROW.ROW, CSSA COL.ROW и MAX.ROW для двух прямых

```{r, include=FALSE}
setup_candidates <- c(
  "00_setup.Rmd",
  file.path("cssa esprit", "00_setup.Rmd")
)
setup_file <- setup_candidates[file.exists(setup_candidates)][1L]
if (is.na(setup_file)) {
  stop("Cannot find 00_setup.Rmd")
}
setup_code <- tempfile(fileext = ".R")
knitr::purl(setup_file, output = setup_code, quiet = TRUE)
source(setup_code, local = knitr::knit_global())
```

```{r, include=FALSE}
threshold_binary <- function(denoised,
                             noisy,
                             threshold = 0.1,
                             use_noise_cut = TRUE,
                             m_coef = 1) {
  denoised <- as.matrix(denoised)
  noise_sd <- sd(as.numeric(noisy - denoised), na.rm = TRUE)
  threshold_value <- if (isTRUE(use_noise_cut)) {
    cur_coef <- as.numeric(m_coef)
    if (!is.finite(cur_coef)) {
      cur_coef <- 1
    }
    noise_sd * cur_coef
  } else {
    cur_threshold <- as.numeric(threshold)
    if (!is.finite(cur_threshold)) {
      cur_threshold <- 0
    }
    cur_threshold
  }

  active <- if (threshold_value <= 0) {
    denoised > 0
  } else {
    denoised >= threshold_value
  }

  list(
    denoised = denoised,
    binary = ifelse(active, 1, 0),
    threshold_value = threshold_value,
    noise_sd = noise_sd
  )
}

cssa_method_binary <- function(m,
                               method = "row.row",
                               noisy = m,
                               threshold = 0.1,
                               use_noise_cut = TRUE,
                               m_coef = 1,
                               num_components = 1L) {
  denoised <- cssa_denoise(
    m,
    num_of_lines = num_components,
    method = method,
    clip = TRUE
  )

  threshold_binary(
    denoised = denoised,
    noisy = noisy,
    threshold = threshold,
    use_noise_cut = use_noise_cut,
    m_coef = m_coef
  )
}

row_max_binary <- function(m, k = 1L) {
  m <- as.matrix(m)
  k <- max(1L, min(as.integer(k)[1L], ncol(m)))
  binary <- matrix(0, nrow = nrow(m), ncol = ncol(m))

  for (i in seq_len(nrow(m))) {
    ind <- order(m[i, ], decreasing = TRUE)[seq_len(k)]
    binary[i, ind] <- m[i, ind]
  }

  list(
    denoised = binary,
    binary = binary,
    threshold_value = NA_real_,
    noise_sd = NA_real_
  )
}

pad_replicate <- function(x, pad) {
  nr <- nrow(x)
  nc <- ncol(x)
  row_idx <- pmin(pmax(seq_len(nr + 2L * pad) - pad, 1L), nr)
  col_idx <- pmin(pmax(seq_len(nc + 2L * pad) - pad, 1L), nc)
  x[row_idx, col_idx]
}

median_denoise <- function(m, n = 3L) {
  x <- clip01(m)
  n <- max(1L, as.integer(n)[1L])
  if (n %% 2L == 0L) {
    n <- n + 1L
  }
  pad <- (n - 1L) %/% 2L
  padded <- pad_replicate(x, pad)
  out <- matrix(0, nrow = nrow(x), ncol = ncol(x))

  for (i in seq_len(nrow(x))) {
    for (j in seq_len(ncol(x))) {
      block <- padded[i:(i + 2L * pad), j:(j + 2L * pad)]
      out[i, j] <- stats::median(block)
    }
  }

  clip01(out)
}

wiener_denoise <- function(m, ksize = 5L) {
  x <- clip01(m)
  ksize <- max(1L, as.integer(ksize)[1L])
  if (ksize %% 2L == 0L) {
    ksize <- ksize + 1L
  }
  pad <- (ksize - 1L) %/% 2L
  padded <- pad_replicate(x, pad)
  local_mean <- matrix(0, nrow = nrow(x), ncol = ncol(x))
  local_var <- matrix(0, nrow = nrow(x), ncol = ncol(x))

  for (i in seq_len(nrow(x))) {
    for (j in seq_len(ncol(x))) {
      block <- padded[i:(i + 2L * pad), j:(j + 2L * pad)]
      local_mean[i, j] <- mean(block)
      local_var[i, j] <- stats::var(as.vector(block))
    }
  }

  local_var[!is.finite(local_var)] <- 0
  local_var[local_var < 0] <- 0
  noise_var <- mean(local_var, na.rm = TRUE)
  gain <- pmax(local_var - noise_var, 0) / pmax(local_var, 1e-8)
  clip01(local_mean + gain * (x - local_mean))
}

bm3d_available <- requireNamespace("reticulate", quietly = TRUE) &&
  reticulate::py_module_available("bm3d")
bm3d_lib <- if (bm3d_available) reticulate::import("bm3d") else NULL

bm3d_denoise <- function(m, sigma_noise) {
  if (!bm3d_available) {
    stop("Python module 'bm3d' is not available")
  }
  x <- as.matrix(m)
  x[!is.finite(x)] <- 0
  clip01(bm3d_lib$bm3d(x, sigma_psd = as.numeric(sigma_noise)))
}

normalize_config_lines <- function(lines) {
  lines <- as.data.frame(lines)
  if (!"intensity" %in% names(lines)) {
    lines$intensity <- 1
  }
  lines <- lines[, c("a", "b", "intensity")]
  lines$a <- as.numeric(lines$a)
  lines$b <- as.numeric(lines$b)
  lines$intensity <- as.numeric(lines$intensity)
  lines
}

cssa_component_limit <- function(n, L = (n + 1L) %/% 2L) {
  n <- as.integer(n)[1L]
  L <- as.integer(L)[1L]
  if (!is.finite(n) || is.na(n) || n < 1L) {
    return(1L)
  }
  if (!is.finite(L) || is.na(L) || L < 1L) {
    L <- (n + 1L) %/% 2L
  }
  K <- n - L + 1L
  max(1L, min(L, K))
}

gcd_int <- function(a, b) {
  a <- abs(as.integer(a))
  b <- abs(as.integer(b))
  while (b != 0L) {
    tmp <- b
    b <- a %% b
    a <- tmp
  }
  a
}

integer_lcm <- function(x) {
  x <- abs(as.integer(x))
  x <- x[is.finite(x) & !is.na(x) & x > 0L]
  if (length(x) == 0L) {
    return(1L)
  }
  as.integer(Reduce(function(a, b) abs(a * b) / gcd_int(a, b), x))
}

esprit_grid_multiplier_from_lines <- function(lines) {
  lines <- normalize_config_lines(lines)
  a <- round(abs(lines$a))
  a[a < 1L] <- 1L
  integer_lcm(a)
}

cssa_rowrow_auto_rank_from_lines <- function(lines) {
  max(1L, nrow(normalize_config_lines(lines)))
}

cssa_colrow_safe_rank_from_lines <- function(lines, n_row, n_col) {
  lines <- normalize_config_lines(lines)
  n_row <- max(1L, as.integer(n_row)[1L])
  n_col <- max(1L, as.integer(n_col)[1L])
  L <- (n_row + 1L) %/% 2L
  K <- n_row - L + 1L

  ranks <- vapply(seq_len(nrow(lines)), function(i) {
    cur_a <- lines$a[i]
    cur_b <- lines$b[i]
    alpha <- max(1, abs(cur_a))

    if (cur_a > 0) {
      y1 <- cur_a + cur_b
      yN <- cur_a * n_col + cur_b
    } else {
      y1 <- n_row + 1 - (cur_a + cur_b)
      yN <- n_row + 1 - (cur_a * n_col + cur_b)
    }

    max(1L, as.integer(floor(min(
      L,
      K,
      max(yN, 0),
      max(n_row + 1 - y1, 0),
      max(alpha, y1) + max(n_row + 1 - yN - alpha, 0)
    ))))
  }, integer(1))

  max(1L, as.integer(sum(ranks)))
}

parse_component_pair <- function(x) {
  if (length(x) == 0L || all(is.na(x))) {
    return(c(row.row = NA_integer_, col.row = NA_integer_))
  }
  parts <- unlist(strsplit(paste(as.character(x), collapse = ","), "[,;[:space:]]+"))
  parts <- parts[nzchar(parts)]
  values <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(parts))
  values <- values[is.finite(values) & !is.na(values) & values >= 1L]
  if (length(values) == 0L) {
    return(c(row.row = NA_integer_, col.row = NA_integer_))
  }
  if (length(values) == 1L) {
    values <- rep(values, 2L)
  }
  c(row.row = values[1L], col.row = values[2L])
}

auto_rank_pair <- function(lines, n_row, n_col) {
  c(
    row.row = min(
      cssa_rowrow_auto_rank_from_lines(lines),
      cssa_component_limit(n_col)
    ),
    col.row = min(
      cssa_colrow_safe_rank_from_lines(lines, n_row, n_col),
      cssa_component_limit(n_row)
    )
  )
}

resolve_method_rank <- function(method, lines, n_row, n_col, cssa_components = NA) {
  auto <- auto_rank_pair(lines, n_row, n_col)
  manual <- parse_component_pair(cssa_components)
  key <- if (grepl("col\\.row", method)) "col.row" else "row.row"
  limit <- if (identical(key, "col.row")) {
    cssa_component_limit(n_row)
  } else {
    cssa_component_limit(n_col)
  }

  if (!is.finite(manual[[key]]) || is.na(manual[[key]])) {
    value <- auto[[key]]
    source <- "auto"
  } else {
    value <- min(max(1L, manual[[key]]), limit)
    source <- if (value < manual[[key]]) "manual_clamped" else "manual"
  }

  list(value = value, source = source, auto = auto[[key]])
}

make_config_matrix <- function(lines,
                               n_row = 100L,
                               n_col = 100L,
                               line_method = "default") {
  lines <- normalize_config_lines(lines)
  out <- matrix(0, nrow = n_row, ncol = n_col)

  for (i in seq_len(nrow(lines))) {
    out <- add.line(
      out,
      a = lines$a[i],
      b = lines$b[i],
      method = line_method,
      intensity = lines$intensity[i]
    )
  }

  out
}

config_true_lines <- function(lines) {
  lines <- normalize_config_lines(lines)
  out <- t(vapply(seq_len(nrow(lines)), function(i) {
    convert_ab_to_rho_theta(lines$a[i], lines$b[i])
  }, numeric(2)))
  colnames(out) <- c("rho", "theta")
  out
}

line_config_labels <- function(lines) {
  lines <- normalize_config_lines(lines)
  sprintf("(%g, %g, %g)", lines$a, lines$b, lines$intensity)
}

line_config_label <- function(lines) {
  paste(line_config_labels(lines), collapse = "; ")
}

parameter_line_errors_by_line <- function(true_lines, pred_lines) {
  true_lines <- as.matrix(true_lines)
  pred_lines <- as.matrix(pred_lines)
  if (nrow(true_lines) != nrow(pred_lines)) {
    stop("true_lines and pred_lines must have the same number of rows")
  }

  pair_error <- function(true_line, pred_line) {
    line_parameter_error(
      c(rho = unname(true_line[1L]), theta = unname(true_line[2L])),
      c(rho = unname(pred_line[1L]), theta = unname(pred_line[2L]))
    )
  }

  n_lines <- nrow(true_lines)
  if (n_lines == 1L) {
    err <- pair_error(true_lines[1L, ], pred_lines[1L, ])
    return(data.frame(
      line_index = 1L,
      pred_index = 1L,
      true_rho = true_lines[1L, "rho"],
      true_theta = true_lines[1L, "theta"],
      pred_rho = pred_lines[1L, "rho"],
      pred_theta = pred_lines[1L, "theta"],
      rho_mse = unname(err["rho_mse"]),
      theta_mse = unname(err["theta_mse"]),
      row.names = NULL
    ))
  }

  all_permutations <- function(v) {
    if (length(v) == 1L) {
      return(matrix(v, nrow = 1L))
    }
    do.call(rbind, lapply(seq_along(v), function(i) {
      cbind(v[i], all_permutations(v[-i]))
    }))
  }

  perms <- all_permutations(seq_len(n_lines))
  best_total <- Inf
  best_perm <- seq_len(n_lines)

  for (i in seq_len(nrow(perms))) {
    cur <- t(vapply(seq_len(n_lines), function(j) {
      pair_error(true_lines[j, ], pred_lines[perms[i, j], ])
    }, numeric(2)))
    cur_mean <- colMeans(cur)
    cur_total <- sum(cur_mean)

    if (cur_total < best_total) {
      best_total <- cur_total
      best_perm <- perms[i, ]
    }
  }

  out <- do.call(rbind, lapply(seq_len(n_lines), function(i) {
    err <- pair_error(true_lines[i, ], pred_lines[best_perm[i], ])
    data.frame(
      line_index = i,
      pred_index = best_perm[i],
      true_rho = true_lines[i, "rho"],
      true_theta = true_lines[i, "theta"],
      pred_rho = pred_lines[best_perm[i], "rho"],
      pred_theta = pred_lines[best_perm[i], "theta"],
      rho_mse = unname(err["rho_mse"]),
      theta_mse = unname(err["theta_mse"]),
      row.names = NULL
    )
  }))
  rownames(out) <- NULL
  out
}

parameter_line_error <- function(true_lines, pred_lines) {
  err <- parameter_line_errors_by_line(true_lines, pred_lines)
  c(
    rho_mse = mean(err$rho_mse),
    theta_mse = mean(err$theta_mse)
  )
}

esprit_project_cssa_corrected <- function(x,
                                          L = (length(x) + 1L) %/% 2L,
                                          num_components = 1L,
                                          frequency_grid_multiplier = 1) {
  x <- as.vector(x)
  N <- length(x)
  num_components <- max(1L, as.integer(num_components)[1L])
  num_components <- min(num_components, cssa_component_limit(N, L = L))
  frequency_grid_multiplier <- as.numeric(frequency_grid_multiplier)[1L]
  if (!is.finite(frequency_grid_multiplier) || frequency_grid_multiplier <= 0) {
    frequency_grid_multiplier <- 1
  }

  tryCatch({
    fit <- Rssa::ssa(x, L = L, kind = "cssa", svd.method = "svd")
    esprit_res <- Rssa::parestimate(
      fit,
      groups = list(signal = seq_len(num_components)),
      method = "esprit",
      normalize.roots = FALSE
    )

    num_components <- min(
      as.integer(num_components)[1L],
      length(esprit_res$frequencies)
    )
    if (num_components < 1L) {
      return(x)
    }

    signal_rec <- Rssa::reconstruct(
      fit,
      groups = list(signal = seq_len(num_components))
    )
    x_signal <- as.vector(signal_rec$signal)
    if (length(x_signal) != N) {
      x_signal <- x
    }

    grid_size <- frequency_grid_multiplier * N
    omega <- round(esprit_res$frequencies[seq_len(num_components)] * grid_size) / grid_size
    omega <- unique(omega)
    mu <- exp(2 * pi * omega * 1i)
    basis <- outer(0:(N - 1L), mu, function(i, z) z ^ i)
    amplitudes <- as.vector(qr.solve(basis, x_signal))

    as.vector(basis %*% amplitudes)
  }, error = function(e) {
    x
  })
}

new_cssa_denoise_by_method <- function(m,
                                       method = c("row.row", "col.row"),
                                       num_components = 1L,
                                       frequency_grid_multiplier = 1,
                                       clip = TRUE) {
  method <- match.arg(method)
  m <- as.matrix(m)
  z <- dft(m)

  z_hat <- switch(
    method,
    "row.row" = {
      L <- (ncol(z) + 1L) %/% 2L
      t(vapply(seq_len(nrow(z)), function(i) {
        as.complex(esprit_project_cssa_corrected(
          z[i, ],
          L = L,
          num_components = num_components,
          frequency_grid_multiplier = frequency_grid_multiplier
        ))
      }, complex(ncol(z))))
    },
    "col.row" = {
      L <- (nrow(z) + 1L) %/% 2L
      vapply(seq_len(ncol(z)), function(j) {
        as.complex(esprit_project_cssa_corrected(
          z[, j],
          L = L,
          num_components = num_components,
          frequency_grid_multiplier = frequency_grid_multiplier
        ))
      }, complex(nrow(z)))
    }
  )

  out <- Re(idft.row(z_hat))
  if (clip) clip01(out) else out
}

parameter_preprocess_binary <- function(m,
                                        method,
                                        threshold = 0.1,
                                        use_noise_cut = TRUE,
                                        m_coef = 1,
                                        num_components = 1L,
                                        frequency_grid_multiplier = 1,
                                        sigma_noise = 0.2,
                                        k = 1L) {
  switch(
    method,
    row.row = cssa_method_binary(
      m,
      method = "row.row",
      noisy = m,
      threshold = threshold,
      use_noise_cut = use_noise_cut,
      m_coef = m_coef,
      num_components = num_components
    ),
    col.row = cssa_method_binary(
      m,
      method = "col.row",
      noisy = m,
      threshold = threshold,
      use_noise_cut = use_noise_cut,
      m_coef = m_coef,
      num_components = num_components
    ),
    row.row.esprit = threshold_binary(
      denoised = new_cssa_denoise_by_method(
        m,
        method = "row.row",
        num_components = num_components,
        frequency_grid_multiplier = frequency_grid_multiplier,
        clip = TRUE
      ),
      noisy = m,
      threshold = threshold,
      use_noise_cut = use_noise_cut,
      m_coef = m_coef
    ),
    max.row = row_max_binary(m, k = k),
    median = threshold_binary(
      denoised = median_denoise(m, n = 3L),
      noisy = m,
      threshold = threshold,
      use_noise_cut = use_noise_cut,
      m_coef = m_coef
    ),
    wiener = threshold_binary(
      denoised = wiener_denoise(m, ksize = 5L),
      noisy = m,
      threshold = threshold,
      use_noise_cut = use_noise_cut,
      m_coef = m_coef
    ),
    bm3d = threshold_binary(
      denoised = bm3d_denoise(m, sigma_noise = sigma_noise),
      noisy = m,
      threshold = threshold,
      use_noise_cut = use_noise_cut,
      m_coef = m_coef
    ),
    stop("Unknown parameter estimation method: ", method)
  )
}

run_parameter_hough_case <- function(method,
                                     label,
                                     lines,
                                     n_row = 100L,
                                     n_col = 100L,
                                     sigma = 0.2,
                                     threshold = 0.1,
                                     use_noise_cut = TRUE,
                                     m_coef = 1,
                                     num_components = 1L,
                                     frequency_grid_multiplier = 1,
                                     rank_source = NA_character_,
                                     auto_rank = NA_integer_,
                                     k = 1L,
                                     rho_step = 0.3,
                                     theta_step = 0.03,
                                     line_method = "default",
                                     clean = NULL,
                                     noisy = NULL) {
  lines <- normalize_config_lines(lines)
  n_lines <- nrow(lines)

  if (is.null(clean)) {
    clean <- make_config_matrix(
      lines,
      n_row = n_row,
      n_col = n_col,
      line_method = line_method
    )
  }
  if (is.null(noisy)) {
    noisy <- add.noise(clean, sigma = sigma)
  }
  processed <- parameter_preprocess_binary(
    noisy,
    method = method,
    threshold = threshold,
    use_noise_cut = use_noise_cut,
    m_coef = m_coef,
    num_components = num_components,
    frequency_grid_multiplier = frequency_grid_multiplier,
    sigma_noise = sigma,
    k = k
  )

  ht <- make_accumulator(
    processed$binary,
    detector = function(m) m,
    rho_step = rho_step,
    theta_step = theta_step
  )

  true_line <- config_true_lines(lines)
  pred_line <- find_k_max(
    ht$accumulator,
    n_lines,
    ht$rho,
    ht$theta,
    suppress = n_lines > 1L
  )
  err <- parameter_line_errors_by_line(true_line, pred_line)
  labels <- line_config_labels(lines)

  data.frame(
    config_id = labels[err$line_index],
    line_index = err$line_index,
    pred_index = err$pred_index,
    method = label,
    method_code = method,
    num_lines = n_lines,
    lines = labels[err$line_index],
    full_config = line_config_label(lines),
    use_noise_cut = use_noise_cut,
    m_coef = m_coef,
    threshold = threshold,
    num_components = num_components,
    cssa_rank_source = rank_source,
    cssa_auto_rank = auto_rank,
    frequency_grid_multiplier = frequency_grid_multiplier,
    k = k,
    threshold_value = processed$threshold_value,
    noise_sd = processed$noise_sd,
    true_rho = err$true_rho,
    true_theta = err$true_theta,
    pred_rho = err$pred_rho,
    pred_theta = err$pred_theta,
    rho_mse = err$rho_mse,
    theta_mse = err$theta_mse,
    active_pixels = sum(processed$binary > 0),
    row.names = NULL
  )
}

make_parameter_methods <- function(use_esprit = FALSE,
                                   threshold_multiplier = 1,
                                   lines = NULL,
                                   n_row = 100L,
                                   n_col = 100L,
                                   cssa_components = NA,
                                   max_row_k = NA_integer_) {
  if (is.null(lines)) {
    lines <- data.frame(a = 1, b = 0, intensity = 1)
  }
  lines <- normalize_config_lines(lines)
  row_rank <- resolve_method_rank(
    "row.row",
    lines = lines,
    n_row = n_row,
    n_col = n_col,
    cssa_components = cssa_components
  )
  col_rank <- resolve_method_rank(
    "col.row",
    lines = lines,
    n_row = n_row,
    n_col = n_col,
    cssa_components = cssa_components
  )
  row_frequency_grid_multiplier <- 1L
  col_frequency_grid_multiplier <- esprit_grid_multiplier_from_lines(lines)

  if (length(max_row_k) == 0L || is.na(max_row_k)) {
    max_row_k <- nrow(lines)
  }
  max_row_k <- max(1L, as.integer(max_row_k)[1L])

  if (isTRUE(use_esprit)) {
    method <- "row.row.esprit"
    label <- "CSSA ROW.ROW + ESPRIT"
    use_noise_cut <- TRUE
    m_coef <- threshold_multiplier
    num_components <- row_rank$value
    cssa_rank_source <- row_rank$source
    cssa_auto_rank <- row_rank$auto
    frequency_grid_multiplier <- row_frequency_grid_multiplier
    k <- 1L
  } else {
    method <- c("row.row", "col.row", "max.row")
    label <- c("CSSA ROW.ROW", "CSSA COL.ROW", "MAX.ROW")
    use_noise_cut <- c(TRUE, TRUE, FALSE)
    m_coef <- c(threshold_multiplier, threshold_multiplier, NA_real_)
    num_components <- c(row_rank$value, col_rank$value, max_row_k)
    cssa_rank_source <- c(row_rank$source, col_rank$source, "k")
    cssa_auto_rank <- c(row_rank$auto, col_rank$auto, nrow(lines))
    frequency_grid_multiplier <- c(row_frequency_grid_multiplier, col_frequency_grid_multiplier, 1L)
    k <- c(1L, 1L, max_row_k)
  }

  filter_method <- if (isTRUE(use_esprit)) character(0) else c("median", "wiener")
  filter_label <- if (isTRUE(use_esprit)) character(0) else c("Median", "Wiener")
  if (!isTRUE(use_esprit) && bm3d_available) {
    filter_method <- c(filter_method, "bm3d")
    filter_label <- c(filter_label, "BM3D")
  }

  data.frame(
    method = c(method, filter_method),
    label = c(label, filter_label),
    use_noise_cut = c(use_noise_cut, rep(TRUE, length(filter_method))),
    m_coef = c(m_coef, rep(threshold_multiplier, length(filter_method))),
    threshold = rep(NA_real_, length(method) + length(filter_method)),
    num_components = c(num_components, rep(0L, length(filter_method))),
    cssa_rank_source = c(cssa_rank_source, rep("filter", length(filter_method))),
    cssa_auto_rank = c(cssa_auto_rank, rep(0L, length(filter_method))),
    frequency_grid_multiplier = c(frequency_grid_multiplier, rep(1L, length(filter_method))),
    k = c(k, rep(NA_integer_, length(filter_method))),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}
```

```{r, fig.width=9, fig.height=4}
set.seed(2026)

demo_cssa_components <- NA_integer_
demo_max_row_k <- 2L
demo_line_method <- "default"
demo_lines <- data.frame(
  a = c(2, -1),
  b = c(-1, 101),
  intensity = c(0.8, 0.5)
)
demo_methods <- make_parameter_methods(
  use_esprit = FALSE,
  threshold_multiplier = 1,
  lines = demo_lines,
  n_row = 100L,
  n_col = 100L,
  cssa_components = demo_cssa_components,
  max_row_k = demo_max_row_k
)
demo_clean <- make_config_matrix(
  demo_lines,
  n_row = 100L,
  n_col = 100L,
  line_method = demo_line_method
)
demo_noisy <- add.noise(demo_clean, sigma = 0.2)
demo_row_row <- cssa_method_binary(
  demo_noisy,
  method = "row.row",
  use_noise_cut = demo_methods$use_noise_cut[1L],
  m_coef = demo_methods$m_coef[1L],
  threshold = demo_methods$threshold[1L],
  num_components = demo_methods$num_components[1L]
)
demo_col_row <- cssa_method_binary(
  demo_noisy,
  method = "col.row",
  use_noise_cut = demo_methods$use_noise_cut[2L],
  m_coef = demo_methods$m_coef[2L],
  threshold = demo_methods$threshold[2L],
  num_components = demo_methods$num_components[2L]
)
demo_max_row <- row_max_binary(demo_noisy, k = demo_max_row_k)

plot.matrix(
  list(
    "CSSA ROW.ROW" = demo_row_row$binary,
    "CSSA COL.ROW" = demo_col_row$binary,
    "MAX.ROW" = demo_max_row$binary
  ),
  from.0.to.1 = TRUE,
  labels = c("CSSA ROW.ROW", "CSSA COL.ROW", "MAX.ROW"),
  nplots = 3
)
```

## Настройки сравнения

```{r}
comparison_n_row <- 100L
comparison_n_col <- 100L
comparison_default_intensity <- 0.8
comparison_line_method <- "default"

parameter_configs <- list(
  two_lines = data.frame(
    a = c(2, -1),
    b = c(-1, 101),
    intensity = c(0.8, 0.5)
  )
)

parameter_config_info <- do.call(rbind, lapply(names(parameter_configs), function(config_id) {
  lines <- normalize_config_lines(parameter_configs[[config_id]])
  labels <- line_config_labels(lines)
  data.frame(
    parent_config_id = config_id,
    config_id = labels,
    line_index = seq_len(nrow(lines)),
    num_lines = nrow(lines),
    lines = labels,
    full_config = line_config_label(lines),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}))
rownames(parameter_config_info) <- NULL

line_configuration_table <- do.call(rbind, lapply(parameter_configs, function(cfg) {
  lines <- normalize_config_lines(cfg)
  data.frame(
    a = lines$a,
    b = lines$b,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}))
line_configuration_table <- data.frame(
  index = seq_len(nrow(line_configuration_table)),
  line_configuration_table,
  row.names = NULL
)

comparison_n_rep <- 100
comparison_sigmas <- c(0.05, 0.2)
comparison_threshold_multipliers <- c(0, 1, 2)

comparison_cssa_components <- NA_integer_
comparison_max_row_k <- NA_integer_

comparison_seed <- 2026L
comparison_rho_step <- 0.02
comparison_theta_step <- 0.002

dt_table(line_configuration_table, caption = "Line configurations")

auto_method_settings <- do.call(rbind, lapply(names(parameter_configs), function(config_id) {
  lines <- normalize_config_lines(parameter_configs[[config_id]])
  methods <- make_parameter_methods(
    use_esprit = TRUE,
    threshold_multiplier = 1,
    lines = lines,
    n_row = comparison_n_row,
    n_col = comparison_n_col,
    cssa_components = comparison_cssa_components,
    max_row_k = comparison_max_row_k
  )
  data.frame(
    parent_config_id = config_id,
    method = methods$label,
    components = methods$num_components,
    source = methods$cssa_rank_source,
    auto_rank = methods$cssa_auto_rank,
    frequency_grid_multiplier = methods$frequency_grid_multiplier,
    k = methods$k,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}))
rownames(auto_method_settings) <- NULL
dt_table(auto_method_settings, caption = "Automatic ranks and ESPRIT grid")
```

```{r, include=FALSE}
project_to_hough_grid <- function(true_line,
                                  rho_step = comparison_rho_step,
                                  theta_step = comparison_theta_step) {
  pred_line <- cbind(
    rho = round(true_line[, "rho"] / rho_step) * rho_step,
    theta = round(true_line[, "theta"] / theta_step) * theta_step
  )
  pred_line[, "theta"] <- pmin(pmax(pred_line[, "theta"], 0), pi)
  pred_line
}

ideal_discretization_case <- function(config_id,
                                      rho_step = comparison_rho_step,
                                      theta_step = comparison_theta_step) {
  lines <- normalize_config_lines(parameter_configs[[config_id]])
  true_line <- config_true_lines(lines)
  pred_line <- project_to_hough_grid(
    true_line,
    rho_step = rho_step,
    theta_step = theta_step
  )
  err <- parameter_line_errors_by_line(true_line, pred_line)
  labels <- line_config_labels(lines)

  data.frame(
    parent_config_id = config_id,
    config_id = labels[err$line_index],
    line_index = err$line_index,
    pred_index = err$pred_index,
    num_lines = nrow(lines),
    lines = labels[err$line_index],
    full_config = line_config_label(lines),
    rho_step = rho_step,
    theta_step = theta_step,
    true_rho = err$true_rho,
    true_theta = err$true_theta,
    ideal_rho = err$pred_rho,
    ideal_theta = err$pred_theta,
    ideal_rho_mse = err$rho_mse,
    ideal_theta_mse = err$theta_mse,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

ideal_discretization_summary <- do.call(
  rbind,
  lapply(names(parameter_configs), ideal_discretization_case)
)
rownames(ideal_discretization_summary) <- NULL

mean_or_na <- function(v) {
  if (all(is.na(v))) {
    NA_real_
  } else {
    mean(v, na.rm = TRUE)
  }
}

resolve_positive_count <- function(value, default) {
  if (length(value) == 0L || is.na(value[1L])) {
    return(max(1L, as.integer(default)[1L]))
  }

  value <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(value)[1L])
  if (is.na(value)) {
    return(max(1L, as.integer(default)[1L]))
  }

  max(1L, value)
}

summarise_parameter_samples <- function(samples, methods, n_rep) {
  out <- aggregate(
    cbind(rho_mse, theta_mse, active_pixels, threshold_value, noise_sd) ~
      sigma + threshold_multiplier + threshold_label + variant +
      parent_config_id + config_id + line_index + method_code + method +
      num_components + cssa_rank_source + cssa_auto_rank + frequency_grid_multiplier,
    data = samples,
    FUN = mean_or_na,
    na.action = na.pass
  )

  names(out)[names(out) == "rho_mse"] <- "mean_rho_mse"
  names(out)[names(out) == "theta_mse"] <- "mean_theta_mse"
  names(out)[names(out) == "active_pixels"] <- "mean_active_pixels"
  names(out)[names(out) == "threshold_value"] <- "mean_threshold"
  names(out)[names(out) == "noise_sd"] <- "mean_noise_sd"
  out$n_rep <- n_rep

  out <- merge(
    parameter_config_info,
    out,
    by = c("parent_config_id", "config_id", "line_index"),
    sort = FALSE
  )
  out <- out[order(
    out$sigma,
    out$threshold_multiplier,
    match(out$parent_config_id, names(parameter_configs)),
    out$line_index,
    match(out$method_code, methods$method)
  ), ]
  rownames(out) <- NULL
  out
}

run_row_col_max_comparison <- function(sigma = 0.2,
                                       threshold_multiplier = 1,
                                       use_esprit = FALSE,
                                       n_rep = comparison_n_rep,
                                       cssa_components = comparison_cssa_components,
                                       max_row_k = comparison_max_row_k,
                                       line_method = comparison_line_method,
                                       seed = comparison_seed,
                                       return_samples = FALSE) {
  set.seed(seed + as.integer(round(1000 * sigma)))
  variant <- if (isTRUE(use_esprit)) "esprit" else "ordinary"
  threshold_label <- if (threshold_multiplier <= 0) {
    "no threshold"
  } else {
    paste0(threshold_multiplier, " sigma")
  }

  samples <- do.call(rbind, lapply(names(parameter_configs), function(config_id) {
    lines <- normalize_config_lines(parameter_configs[[config_id]])
    num_lines <- nrow(lines)
    cur_max_row_k <- resolve_positive_count(max_row_k, num_lines)
    methods <- make_parameter_methods(
      use_esprit = use_esprit,
      threshold_multiplier = threshold_multiplier,
      lines = lines,
      n_row = comparison_n_row,
      n_col = comparison_n_col,
      cssa_components = cssa_components,
      max_row_k = cur_max_row_k
    )
    clean <- make_config_matrix(
      lines,
      n_row = comparison_n_row,
      n_col = comparison_n_col,
      line_method = line_method
    )

    do.call(rbind, lapply(seq_len(n_rep), function(rep_i) {
      noisy <- add.noise(clean, sigma = sigma)

      rows <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(methods)), function(method_i) {
        out <- run_parameter_hough_case(
          method = methods$method[method_i],
          label = methods$label[method_i],
          lines = lines,
          n_row = comparison_n_row,
          n_col = comparison_n_col,
          sigma = sigma,
          threshold = methods$threshold[method_i],
          use_noise_cut = methods$use_noise_cut[method_i],
          m_coef = methods$m_coef[method_i],
          num_components = methods$num_components[method_i],
          frequency_grid_multiplier = methods$frequency_grid_multiplier[method_i],
          rank_source = methods$cssa_rank_source[method_i],
          auto_rank = methods$cssa_auto_rank[method_i],
          k = methods$k[method_i],
          rho_step = comparison_rho_step,
          theta_step = comparison_theta_step,
          line_method = line_method,
          clean = clean,
          noisy = noisy
        )
        out$parent_config_id <- config_id
        out$rep <- rep_i
        out$sigma <- sigma
        out$threshold_multiplier <- threshold_multiplier
        out$threshold_label <- threshold_label
        out$variant <- variant
        out
      })

      do.call(rbind, rows)
    }))
  }))

  method_order <- make_parameter_methods(
    use_esprit = use_esprit,
    threshold_multiplier = threshold_multiplier,
    lines = normalize_config_lines(parameter_configs[[1L]]),
    n_row = comparison_n_row,
    n_col = comparison_n_col,
    cssa_components = NA,
    max_row_k = 1L
  )
  summary <- summarise_parameter_samples(samples, methods = method_order, n_rep = n_rep)

  if (isTRUE(return_samples)) {
    return(list(summary = summary, samples = samples))
  }

  summary
}

run_all_comparisons <- function(sigmas = comparison_sigmas,
                                threshold_multipliers = comparison_threshold_multipliers,
                                n_rep = comparison_n_rep,
                                cssa_components = comparison_cssa_components,
                                max_row_k = comparison_max_row_k,
                                line_method = comparison_line_method,
                                return_samples = FALSE) {
  ordinary_grid <- expand.grid(
    sigma = sigmas,
    threshold_multiplier = threshold_multipliers,
    use_esprit = FALSE
  )
  esprit_grid <- expand.grid(
    sigma = sigmas,
    threshold_multiplier = threshold_multipliers,
    use_esprit = TRUE
  )
  grid <- rbind(ordinary_grid, esprit_grid)

  results <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(grid)), function(i) {
    run_row_col_max_comparison(
      sigma = grid$sigma[i],
      threshold_multiplier = grid$threshold_multiplier[i],
      use_esprit = grid$use_esprit[i],
      n_rep = n_rep,
      cssa_components = cssa_components,
      max_row_k = max_row_k,
      line_method = line_method,
      return_samples = return_samples
    )
  })

  if (isTRUE(return_samples)) {
    return(list(
      summary = do.call(rbind, lapply(results, `[[`, "summary")),
      samples = do.call(rbind, lapply(results, `[[`, "samples"))
    ))
  }

  do.call(rbind, results)
}

xtab_df <- function(x, value_col) {
  x$method <- factor(
    x$method,
    levels = unique(x$method[order(match(x$method_code, unique(x$method_code)))])
  )
  tab <- xtabs(
    stats::as.formula(paste(value_col, "~ config_id + method")),
    data = x
  )
  out <- as.data.frame.matrix(tab, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  out$config_id <- rownames(out)
  out <- out[, c("config_id", setdiff(names(out), "config_id")), drop = FALSE]
  rownames(out) <- NULL
  out
}

ideal_xtab_df <- function(cur, value_col) {
  method_grid <- unique(cur[, c("config_id", "method_code", "method"), drop = FALSE])
  ideal_cur <- merge(
    ideal_discretization_summary[, c("config_id", value_col), drop = FALSE],
    method_grid,
    by = "config_id",
    sort = FALSE
  )
  xtab_df(ideal_cur, value_col)
}

chapter3_table_output_dir <- file.path("generated_tables", "chapter3")

metric_order <- c("mean_rho_mse", "mean_theta_mse", "mean_active_pixels")
metric_labels_display <- c(
  mean_rho_mse = "MSE rho",
  mean_theta_mse = "MSE theta",
  mean_active_pixels = "active pixels"
)
metric_labels_latex <- c(
  mean_rho_mse = "MSE по $\\rho$",
  mean_theta_mse = "MSE по $\\theta$",
  mean_active_pixels = "Активные пиксели"
)

method_labels_display <- c(
  row = "ROW.ROW",
  col = "COL.ROW",
  max = "MAX.ROW",
  median = "Median",
  wiener = "Wiener",
  row_esprit = "ROW.ROW + ESPRIT"
)
method_labels_latex <- c(
  row = "\\texttt{ROW.ROW}",
  col = "\\texttt{COL.ROW}",
  max = "\\texttt{MAX.ROW}",
  median = "Median",
  wiener = "Wiener",
  row_esprit = "\\texttt{ROW.ROW}+ESPRIT"
)

sigma_suffix <- function(sigma) {
  sprintf("%03d", as.integer(round(100 * as.numeric(sigma))))
}

threshold_suffix <- function(threshold_multiplier) {
  if (threshold_multiplier <= 0) {
    return("nothr")
  }
  paste0("thr", as.integer(threshold_multiplier))
}

threshold_caption <- function(threshold_multiplier) {
  if (threshold_multiplier <= 0) {
    return("без порога")
  }
  paste0("порог $", threshold_multiplier, "\\hat\\sigma$")
}

threshold_caption_display <- function(threshold_multiplier) {
  if (threshold_multiplier <= 0) {
    return("no threshold")
  }
  paste0("threshold = ", threshold_multiplier, " sigma-hat")
}

make_dynamic_method_spec <- function(threshold_multiplier) {
  ordinary <- data.frame(
    column_key = c("row", "col", "max", "median", "wiener"),
    method = c("CSSA ROW.ROW", "CSSA COL.ROW", "MAX.ROW", "Median", "Wiener"),
    variant = rep("ordinary", 5L),
    threshold_multiplier = rep(threshold_multiplier, 5L),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  esprit <- data.frame(
    column_key = "row_esprit",
    method = "CSSA ROW.ROW + ESPRIT",
    variant = "esprit",
    threshold_multiplier = threshold_multiplier,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )

  out <- list()
  if (threshold_multiplier %in% comparison_threshold_multipliers) {
    out[[length(out) + 1L]] <- ordinary
  }
  out[[length(out) + 1L]] <- esprit
  do.call(rbind, out)
}

make_dynamic_chapter3_table_specs <- function() {
  thresholds <- sort(unique(comparison_threshold_multipliers))

  specs <- list()
  for (sigma in comparison_sigmas) {
    for (threshold_multiplier in thresholds) {
      methods <- make_dynamic_method_spec(threshold_multiplier)
      if (is.null(methods) || nrow(methods) == 0L) {
        next
      }
      id <- paste0(
        "ch3_two_",
        sigma_suffix(sigma),
        "_",
        threshold_suffix(threshold_multiplier)
      )
      specs[[length(specs) + 1L]] <- list(
        id = id,
        sigma = sigma,
        methods = methods,
        caption_display = paste0(
          "Two lines: sigma = ",
          formatC(sigma, format = "f", digits = 2),
          ", ",
          threshold_caption_display(threshold_multiplier)
        ),
        caption_latex = paste0(
          "Две прямые: $\\sigma=",
          formatC(sigma, format = "f", digits = 2),
          "$, ",
          threshold_caption(threshold_multiplier)
        ),
        label = paste0("tab:", id)
      )
    }
  }
  specs
}

chapter3_table_specs <- make_dynamic_chapter3_table_specs()

format_metric_value <- function(x, metric) {
  if (is.na(x)) {
    return("")
  }
  if (metric == "mean_active_pixels") {
    out <- formatC(x, format = "f", digits = 1)
    return(sub("\\.0$", "", out))
  }
  if (x == 0) {
    return("0")
  }
  abs_x <- abs(x)
  if (metric == "mean_theta_mse") {
    if (abs_x < 1e-3) {
      return(sprintf("%.2e", x))
    }
    return(sprintf("%.4f", x))
  }
  if (abs_x < 0.01) {
    return(sprintf("%.2e", x))
  }
  if (abs_x >= 100) {
    return(sprintf("%.1f", x))
  }
  sprintf("%.4f", x)
}

format_config_label <- function(config_id) {
  compact <- gsub("\\s+", "", config_id)
  parts <- strsplit(gsub("[()]", "", compact), ",", fixed = FALSE)[[1L]]
  if (length(parts) >= 3L) {
    paste0("(", parts[1L], ",", parts[2L], ";c=", parts[3L], ")")
  } else {
    compact
  }
}

latex_table_lines <- function(df, caption, label) {
  n_cols <- ncol(df)
  header <- paste(colnames(df), collapse = " & ")
  align <- paste0("|l|l|", paste(rep("c", n_cols - 2L), collapse = "|"), "|")
  body <- unlist(lapply(seq_len(nrow(df)), function(i) {
    c(paste(df[i, ], collapse = " & "), "\\\\", "\\hline")
  }))

  c(
    "\\begin{table}[H]",
    "\\centering",
    sprintf("\\caption{%s}", caption),
    sprintf("\\label{%s}", label),
    "\\resizebox{\\textwidth}{!}{%",
    sprintf("\\begin{tabular}{%s}", align),
    "\\hline",
    header,
    "\\\\",
    "\\hline",
    body,
    "\\end{tabular}%",
    "}",
    "\\end{table}"
  )
}

build_combined_table <- function(summary_df, sigma_value, method_spec, caption_display, caption_latex, label) {
  config_order <- sort(unique(parameter_config_info$config_id))
  metric_wide <- lapply(metric_order, function(metric) {
    rows <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(method_spec)), function(i) {
      src <- method_spec[i, ]
      cur <- subset(
        summary_df,
        sigma == sigma_value &
          variant == src$variant &
          threshold_multiplier == src$threshold_multiplier &
          method == src$method
      )
      out <- cur[, c("config_id", metric), drop = FALSE]
      names(out)[2L] <- src$column_key
      out
    })
    merged <- Reduce(function(x, y) merge(x, y, by = "config_id", all = TRUE, sort = FALSE), rows)
    merged[match(config_order, merged$config_id), , drop = FALSE]
  })
  names(metric_wide) <- metric_order

  column_keys <- method_spec$column_key
  display_rows <- list()
  latex_rows <- list()
  for (config_id in config_order) {
    for (metric in metric_order) {
      cur <- metric_wide[[metric]]
      row_idx <- match(config_id, cur$config_id)
      values <- vapply(column_keys, function(key) format_metric_value(cur[row_idx, key], metric), character(1))
      display_rows[[length(display_rows) + 1L]] <- c(if (metric == metric_order[1L]) format_config_label(config_id) else "", metric_labels_display[[metric]], values)
      latex_rows[[length(latex_rows) + 1L]] <- c(if (metric == metric_order[1L]) paste0("$", format_config_label(config_id), "$") else "", metric_labels_latex[[metric]], values)
    }
  }

  display_df <- as.data.frame(do.call(rbind, display_rows), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  latex_df <- as.data.frame(do.call(rbind, latex_rows), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  names(display_df) <- c("Configuration", "Metric", unname(method_labels_display[column_keys]))
  names(latex_df) <- c("Конфигурация", "Метрика", unname(method_labels_latex[column_keys]))

  list(display = display_df, latex = latex_df, caption_display = caption_display, caption_latex = caption_latex, label = label)
}

export_combined_table <- function(table_obj, file_path) {
  dir.create(dirname(file_path), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  writeLines(latex_table_lines(table_obj$latex, table_obj$caption_latex, table_obj$label), con = file_path, useBytes = TRUE)
  invisible(file_path)
}

render_chapter3_table <- function(summary_df, spec) {
  table_obj <- build_combined_table(
    summary_df = summary_df,
    sigma_value = spec$sigma,
    method_spec = spec$methods,
    caption_display = spec$caption_display,
    caption_latex = spec$caption_latex,
    label = spec$label
  )
  export_combined_table(table_obj, file.path(chapter3_table_output_dir, paste0(spec$id, ".tex")))
  dt_table(table_obj$display, caption = table_obj$caption_display)
}

export_all_chapter3_tables <- function(summary_df, specs = chapter3_table_specs) {
  dir.create(chapter3_table_output_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  invisible(lapply(specs, function(spec) {
    table_obj <- build_combined_table(
      summary_df = summary_df,
      sigma_value = spec$sigma,
      method_spec = spec$methods,
      caption_display = spec$caption_display,
      caption_latex = spec$caption_latex,
      label = spec$label
    )
    export_combined_table(table_obj, file.path(chapter3_table_output_dir, paste0(spec$id, ".tex")))
  }))
  data.frame(file = file.path(chapter3_table_output_dir, paste0(vapply(specs, `[[`, character(1), "id"), ".tex")), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
}

chapter3_data_output_dir <- file.path("generated_tables", "chapter3_data")

experiment_parameter_table <- function(prefix) {
  data.frame(
    prefix = prefix,
    n_row = comparison_n_row,
    n_col = comparison_n_col,
    n_rep = comparison_n_rep,
    rho_step = comparison_rho_step,
    theta_step = comparison_theta_step,
    sigmas = paste(comparison_sigmas, collapse = ", "),
    threshold_multipliers = paste(comparison_threshold_multipliers, collapse = ", "),
    cssa_components = paste(comparison_cssa_components, collapse = ", "),
    max_row_k = paste(comparison_max_row_k, collapse = ", "),
    line_method = comparison_line_method,
    seed = comparison_seed,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

write_export_csv <- function(x, path) {
  utils::write.csv(x, path, row.names = FALSE, fileEncoding = "UTF-8")
  invisible(path)
}

export_comparison_data <- function(summary_df, samples_df, prefix) {
  dir.create(chapter3_data_output_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

  outputs <- data.frame(
    kind = c(
      "raw_samples_csv",
      "raw_samples_rds",
      "summary_csv",
      "summary_rds",
      "ideal_discretization_csv",
      "line_configurations_csv",
      "auto_method_settings_csv",
      "experiment_parameters_csv"
    ),
    file = file.path(
      chapter3_data_output_dir,
      paste0(
        prefix,
        c(
          "_raw_samples.csv",
          "_raw_samples.rds",
          "_summary.csv",
          "_summary.rds",
          "_ideal_discretization.csv",
          "_line_configurations.csv",
          "_auto_method_settings.csv",
          "_experiment_parameters.csv"
        )
      )
    ),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )

  write_export_csv(samples_df, outputs$file[outputs$kind == "raw_samples_csv"])
  saveRDS(samples_df, outputs$file[outputs$kind == "raw_samples_rds"])
  write_export_csv(summary_df, outputs$file[outputs$kind == "summary_csv"])
  saveRDS(summary_df, outputs$file[outputs$kind == "summary_rds"])
  write_export_csv(ideal_discretization_summary, outputs$file[outputs$kind == "ideal_discretization_csv"])
  write_export_csv(line_configuration_table, outputs$file[outputs$kind == "line_configurations_csv"])
  write_export_csv(auto_method_settings, outputs$file[outputs$kind == "auto_method_settings_csv"])
  write_export_csv(experiment_parameter_table(prefix), outputs$file[outputs$kind == "experiment_parameters_csv"])

  outputs
}
```

```{r}
comparison_results <- run_all_comparisons(return_samples = TRUE)
comparison_summary <- comparison_results$summary
comparison_samples <- comparison_results$samples
chapter3_exported_files <- export_all_chapter3_tables(comparison_summary)
chapter3_exported_data <- export_comparison_data(
  comparison_summary,
  comparison_samples,
  prefix = "04_two_lines"
)
```

## Generated comparison tables

```{r}
htmltools::tagList(lapply(chapter3_table_specs, function(spec) {
  htmltools::tagList(
    htmltools::tags$h3(spec$caption_display),
    render_chapter3_table(comparison_summary, spec)
  )
}))
```

## Exported files

```{r}
dt_table(chapter3_exported_files, caption = "Saved LaTeX tables")
```

```{r}
dt_table(chapter3_exported_data, caption = "Saved data files")
```

```{r}
dt_table(utils::head(comparison_samples, 200), caption = "Raw samples preview")
```
